resources.string: Listen to songs to generate your quick picks
Library songs will show up here
Library artists will show up here
Library albums will show up here
Your playlists will show up here
Do you really want to remove all \"%s\" playlist songs from the Downloaded Songs storage?
Do you really want to delete the playlist \"%s\"?
Adding local songs to synced playlists is not supported
Choose an image from your library
The song is already in your playlist
%d songs are already in your playlist
Control your music with play/pause, skip, and like buttons
Compact square widget for quick playback control
Compact wide widget showing song info and controls
Apple-style frosted glass on mini player and cards
Hide the thumbnail in the mini player
Crop album art to fill the player background
Removes the lead vocal so only the instrumental plays — sing along with the synced lyrics. Works best on stereo songs where the vocal is mixed centre.
Enable glow effect on current lyric line
Show music notes & progress between lines (gap ≥ %1$ds)
Let word‑sync animations finish even when the next line starts (e.g. background vocals)
Custom font selected · tap to change
Swipe right to add to playlist
Swipe left to remove from playlist
Enable Better Lyrics provider (requires separate installation)
Use LyricsPlus as a lyrics source (aggregates multiple providers)
Use hardware audio decoding when possible
Crossfade is in beta. If you encounter issues, please report them.
Use hardware audio decoding when possible
Add seek time to current position
Restore your last queue when the app starts
Automatically add more songs when the end of the queue is reached, if possible
Disable load more when repeat is on
Don\'t auto load more when repeat all is enabled
Show similar songs in the queue
Remember shuffle and repeat mode when app restarts
When playing a playlist, start with shuffle
Auto skip to next song when error occurs
Pause music when media is muted
Keep screen on when player is expanded
Enable interactive voice control with animated overlay. Say commands like \"Play\", \"Next\", or \"Search songs\".
Continuously listen for \"Hey Aura\" to activate voice commands without touching the screen. Works while the app is open.
Set your custom wake word (default: Aura)
Hear spoken confirmations for voice commands
Select TTS voice (US, UK, Australian, etc.)
Are you sure you want to delete all downloaded songs?
Are you sure you want to clear the song cache?
Are you sure you want to clear the image cache?
Your cache size is large. Consider clearing it to free up space.
Are you sure you want to clear all listen history?
Are you sure you want to clear all search history?
This can influence what content you see and for example shows premium-only albums if you are logged in with a Premium account
When this option is on, screenshots and the app\'s view in Recents are disabled.

AuraMusic uses the KizzyRPC library to set your Discord account\'s status. This involves using the Discord Gateway connection, which may be considered a violation of Discord\'s TOS. However, there are no known cases of user accounts being suspended for this reason. Use at your own risk.\nAuraMusic will only extract your token, and everything else is stored locally.
Show current song in Discord details
Listen to music with friends in real-time
You will be disconnected if you leave the app
Cannot edit username while in a room
Create a new Listen Together room
You have been blocked by the host
Remove this user from the room
Remove and block this user from joining again
Transfer host privileges to another user
Songs played during this session will appear here
Are you sure you want to clear all recognition history?
Hum, sing, or whistle a melody to find the song
Couldn\'t identify the melody. Try humming more clearly.
Discover your top songs, artists, and more
Special thanks to you for supporting AuraMusic!
The lyrics language is different from the detected language
Show romanized lyrics instead of original script
Enable automatic video playback for video songs
Video not available for this track
Adjust to sync lyrics with video (for intro/talk before music)
